change_request: Correct homepage messaging: replace informational hero headline with question-driven eligibility headline, add micro-trust line beneath subtitle, remove state-of-Colorado funding implication from program overview, add form reassurance line. Changes in EN and ES translations and homepage page component only.
acceptance_criteria: Hero title is question-driven and eligibility-focused
Hero subtitle avoids implying government funding
microTrust line appears beneath hero subtitle
programOverview.body no longer references the State of Colorado as funding source
eligibilityForm.reassurance field exists in both EN and ES
Reassurance line renders beneath the lead capture form
No layout or component structural changes
Both /en/ and /es/ routes reflect the corrections

risks: app/[lang]/page.tsx:HomePage - Rendering issues with new microTrust line
